title: Roadmapping Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger roadmapping foundations judgment so product work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Roadmapping Foundations is a leverage point inside product. It supports the broader goal of what to build, what not to build, and how to ship it.
coreConcepts: Roadmapping Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good roadmapping foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Roadmapping Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
